---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional context

Anything else, e.g. how it interacts with auth modes, scopes, or the command
allow-list.
